name: dashboard-helper
description: Open remote SSH folders in a new VS Code window and sync active workspaces to your self-hosted developer dashboard.

dashboardHelper.backendUrl.markdownDescription: URL of your self-hosted dashboard backend, e.g. `https://dashboard.example.com`

dashboardHelper.agentToken.markdownDescription: Secret token matching the `AGENT_TOKEN` environment variable on the backend

dashboardHelper.hostAlias.markdownDescription: Identifier for this host (e.g. SSH config alias). Defaults to the system hostname.

dashboardHelper.reportInterval.markdownDescription: How often (in seconds) to send a workspace heartbeat to the backend (default: 60)
